title: Wired Lane B loop scores fixtures' own reference content against their own criteria; no model is invoked, dispatch-model.cjs is dead in the wired path, aggregate score is model-independent constant
evidence: loop-host.planInvocation(model-benchmark) returns ONLY [materialize, run-benchmark] (loop-host.cjs:153-159). materialize writes each fixture's own content/markdown to {id}.md (materialize.cjs:36-58,91). run-benchmark scores that same {id}.md against the same fixture's requiredHeadings/requiredPatterns (run-benchmark.cjs:434-437). auto YAML phase_loop runs only loop-host (auto.yaml:147); no step writes model output into benchmark-outputs/{id}.md. Live: materialize+run-benchmark on default profile => aggregateScore 100, benchmark-pass, all rows 100. 5dim+llm reads the materialized reference file as outputText (run-benchmark.cjs:274), grading the reference, not a model candidate. dispatch-model.cjs is referenced in docs/README + loop-host RESOLVE set but never spawned by any plan/YAML step.
fix: Insert a per-fixture dispatch step (call dispatch-model.cjs, overwrite {id}.md with model stdout) BEFORE run-benchmark scores it; OR if Lane B is intentionally fixture-self-validation, rewrite role/purpose/docs and remove the 'benchmark a model' framing + dispatch-model references; OR gate the loop so it does not emit a model verdict it never measured.

title: loop-host lists dispatch-model.cjs in LANE_MODEL_BENCHMARK resolve set but planInvocation never plans it, so its resolveScriptPath branch is unreachable
evidence: LANE_MODEL_BENCHMARK = Set(['run-benchmark.cjs','dispatch-model.cjs']) (loop-host.cjs:48-51) and resolveScriptPath maps dispatch-model.cjs to ../model-benchmark/dispatch-model.cjs (79-81), but planInvocation only ever returns materialize + run-benchmark (130-159). No plan step names dispatch-model.cjs; the lane entry and resolver branch are unreachable from loop-host. This is the structural footprint of correctness-9-1.
fix: Either wire the dispatch step (see correctness-9-1) or drop the unused dispatch-model.cjs entry from LANE_MODEL_BENCHMARK to remove the misleading 'it is wired' signal.

detail: correctness-9-1 distinct from correctness-5-1 (promotion non-executable) and traceability-7-1 (mode-aware promotion claim): this is about the core benchmark scoring measuring nothing about a model, not about the optional promotion step.

reason: interpolated section fragment derives only from the fixed label set in generate-profile.deriveStructural (CORE/OUTPUT/ANTI/CAPABILITY/RULES/RELATED); none contain regex metacharacters, so construction cannot crash in practice. Latent only.
sound for all traversal cases; the only quirk (abs in-cwd path with '..' substring in filename classified bare_relative) does not change D3 score since both classes score 1.0.

direction: dispatch backoff trailing return / grep double-RegExp / promote timestamp collision
reason: trailing return after dispatch loop is unreachable dead code (benign); invalid grep patterns are caught by the scorer's outer try; backup timestamp collision needs two guarded manual promotions in the same ms (impractical).
